name: Robinson J.
bio: Computer Science postgraduate targeting a software engineering role focused on building reliable, scalable systems.
about: I am a Computer Science postgraduate with strong foundations in data structures, algorithms, OOP, and system design.
I have built and shipped production-grade projects applying REST API design, component-based architecture, and scalable data modeling.
Proficient in Python, JavaScript, Java, and modern web frameworks. I am passionate about writing clean, testable, high-performance code and solving complex engineering problems at scale.

Beyond software engineering, I am a self-taught video editor, color grader, and award-winning photographer, bringing a unique blend of analytical problem-solving and creative visual storytelling to every project.
